summary: Comprehensive testing completed successfully for referral system and offline mode features. Backend: 12/12 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All new features verified and working correctly. Referral system fully functional with unique codes (FC + 5 chars), 100 XP bonus for both users, referral stats endpoint. Offline mode implemented with AsyncStorage cache, offline fallback, and sync status. Profile shows all 3 new sections: Parrainage (referral), Mode hors-ligne (offline cache), and Synchronisation (sync status). Register screen has referral code input field.
critical_code_review_comments: ✓ Referral system: generate_referral_code() creates 'FC' + 5 random chars (line 48-49 in server.py)
✓ Referral system: user_response includes referral_code (line 62 in server.py)
✓ Referral system: New users get referral_code on registration (line 172 in server.py)
✓ Referral system: Register endpoint handles referral_code - both users get 100 XP (lines 178-192 in server.py)
✓ Referral system: GET /api/referral/stats returns referral_code, referral_count, xp_earned_from_referrals, referred_users (lines 1051-1068 in server.py)
✓ Referral system: Seed data updated to add referral_code to existing admin users (lines 1146-1169 in server.py)
✓ Offline mode: AsyncStorage-based cache (not SQLite - crashes on web)
✓ Offline mode: offlineCache.ts has cacheSubjects, getCachedSubjects, cacheFlashcards, getCachedFlashcards, savePendingResult, getPendingResults, clearPendingResults, getOfflineStatus
✓ Offline mode: Home screen caches subjects on fetch, falls back to cache on error (lines 50-58 in home.tsx)
✓ Sync status: GET /api/sync/status returns synced, card_progress_count, session_count, last_activity, server_time (lines 1008-1023 in server.py from iteration 6)
✓ Register screen: referralCode state (line 15 in register.tsx)
✓ Register screen: Referral code input field with gift icon, testID='register-referral-input' (lines 113-124 in register.tsx)
✓ Register screen: register() called with referralCode.trim() || undefined (line 35 in register.tsx)
✓ AuthContext: register function accepts referralCode parameter (line 24, 70-81 in AuthContext.tsx)
✓ AuthContext: Sends referral_code in POST /api/auth/register (line 74 in AuthContext.tsx)
✓ Profile screen: referralStats and offlineInfo state (lines 32-33 in profile.tsx)
✓ Profile screen: Fetches referral stats and offline status (lines 38-46 in profile.tsx)
✓ Profile screen: Referral card with code, share button, count (lines 195-215 in profile.tsx)
✓ Profile screen: Offline cache status card (lines 217-235 in profile.tsx)
✓ Profile screen: Sync status card (lines 237-254 in profile.tsx)
✓ All endpoints require authentication (JWT Bearer token)
✓ MongoDB ObjectId properly excluded from all responses
✓ All new UI elements have proper testID attributes for testing
✓ All existing features still present and working (challenges, daily rewards, grade filter, study modes)
updated_files: /app/backend/server.py (seed_data function updated to add referral_code to existing users)

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all new features working correctly, 16/16 UI checks passed)

seed_data_creation: No additional seed data created. Admin user now has referral_code after seed_data update.
context_for_next_testing_agent: 2 new features implemented correctly: 1) Referral system: Each user gets unique referral_code (FC + 5 chars). Register endpoint accepts optional referral_code. If valid, both users get 100 XP. GET /api/referral/stats returns code + count. Profile shows referral card with code, share button, and count. Backend tests verify referral flow end-to-end. 2) Offline mode: AsyncStorage-based cache (not SQLite - crashes on web). cacheSubjects/getCachedSubjects for offline fallback. Home screen caches on fetch, falls back to cache on error. Profile shows offline status section with cache info. Sync status section shows session count and card progress. All previous features still working (challenges, daily rewards, subjects, study modes). Backend: 12/12 tests passed. Frontend: All UI elements verified.

POST /api/auth/register - Works with valid referral code (100 XP to both users) ✓
POST /api/auth/register - Works with invalid referral code (0 XP, no error) ✓
GET /api/referral/stats - Returns referral_code, referral_count, xp_earned_from_referrals, referred_users ✓
GET /api/sync/status - Returns synced, card_progress_count, session_count, server_time ✓

referral_system.backend: ✓ generate_referral_code() creates 'FC' + 5 random chars. ✓ New users get referral_code on registration. ✓ Register endpoint accepts optional referral_code. ✓ If valid referral code, both users get 100 XP (new user starts with 100 XP, referrer gets +100 XP). ✓ GET /api/referral/stats returns referral_code, referral_count, xp_earned_from_referrals, referred_users. ✓ Seed data updated to add referral_code to existing admin users. ✓ All 6 referral tests passed.
referral_system.frontend: ✓ Register screen has referral code input field (placeholder: 'Code parrainage (optionnel)'). ✓ Input has gift icon and testID='register-referral-input'. ✓ AuthContext register() accepts referralCode parameter. ✓ Profile screen shows Parrainage section. ✓ Profile displays referral code (FC + 5 chars). ✓ Profile shows 'Inviter un ami (+100 XP chacun)' share button. ✓ Profile shows referral count and XP earned. ✓ All UI elements verified via Playwright tests.
referral_system.integration: ✓ Backend API tested and working (12/12 tests passed). ✓ Frontend UI tested and working (all sections visible). ✓ Referral flow end-to-end: Register with code → Both users get 100 XP → Stats updated → Profile shows correct data.

offline_mode.backend: ✓ GET /api/sync/status endpoint exists (from iteration 6). ✓ Returns synced, card_progress_count, session_count, last_activity, server_time. ✓ Queries MongoDB for user_card_progress and study_sessions counts. ✓ All sync status tests passed.
offline_mode.frontend: ✓ offlineCache.ts uses AsyncStorage (not SQLite - crashes on web). ✓ Functions: cacheSubjects, getCachedSubjects, cacheFlashcards, getCachedFlashcards, savePendingResult, getPendingResults, clearPendingResults, getOfflineStatus. ✓ Home screen caches subjects on fetch (line 51 in home.tsx). ✓ Home screen falls back to cache on error (lines 53-57 in home.tsx). ✓ Profile screen shows 'Mode hors-ligne' section. ✓ Profile displays cache status (subjects cached or 'Aucun cache local'). ✓ Profile shows pending results count if any. ✓ Profile shows 'Synchronisation' section. ✓ Profile displays session count and card progress count. ✓ Profile shows last activity date if available. ✓ All UI elements verified via Playwright tests.
offline_mode.integration: ✓ Backend API tested and working (sync status endpoint). ✓ Frontend UI tested and working (offline and sync sections visible). ✓ Cache logic implemented correctly (cache on success, fallback on error). ✓ AsyncStorage used instead of SQLite to avoid web crashes.

screenshots_analysis.home_screen: Shows Admin user, 1255 XP, Niveau 3, 1 streak. Daily reward banner 'Récompense Jour 1' visible. Grade filter shows 6ème selected (orange). Challenges section shows 'Marathonien' (5/5 with +200 XP button) and 'Sans faute' (2/2 with checkmark). Subject cards visible. Purple AI FAB and orange create FAB visible at bottom right.
screenshots_analysis.profile_screen: Shows Admin user profile with orange avatar 'A', email admin@flashcards.com. Stats cards: 1255 XP Total, 3 Niveau, 1 Streak. Progress bar 'Progression niveau 4' showing 255/500 XP. Theme toggle 'Thème sombre' (Mode sombre activé). Grade selector showing 6ème selected (orange). Other grades: Tous, 5ème, 4ème, 3ème, 2nde, 1ère, Terminale. Parrainage section visible with referral code, share button. Mode hors-ligne section visible. Synchronisation section visible.
screenshots_analysis.register_screen: Shows 'FlashCards' title with 'Crée ton compte' subtitle. Form has 4 input fields: Prénom (name), Email, Mot de passe (min. 6 caractères), Code parrainage (optionnel). Orange 'S'inscrire' button. Link to login 'Déjà un compte ? Se connecter'.

regression_testing.home_screen: ✓ PASS - All features visible (daily reward, challenges, grade filter, subjects)
regression_testing.profile_screen: ✓ PASS - All existing sections visible (stats, theme, grade, badges, leitner boxes)

rca_of_issue: No issues found. All features working correctly. Minor note: seed_data function was updated to add referral_code to existing admin users who were created before the referral feature was added. This ensures backward compatibility.
